about.story_title:
Born from an overflowing wardrobe,
driven by a conviction.
about.story_p1: Mix&Match Frip was born from an overflowing wardrobe and an unapologetic love for beautiful clothes — too often given away simply for lack of space. Rather than letting these pieces collect dust or disappear, the idea took shape: create an online pre-owned women's boutique to give a second life to every favourite find, and let others enjoy these treasures at a great price.
about.story_p2: Very quickly, my circle saw themselves in this story: friends, colleagues and family started entrusting me with their own carefully chosen pieces to join the selection. Each item is hand-picked for its quality, style and ability to pair with the rest of a wardrobe — to create a true mix & match game between garments.
about.story_p3: By choosing pre-owned, you take part in a more responsible approach to fashion: every resold garment avoids another textile waste and limits the impact of fast fashion on the environment. Mix&Match Frip is rooted in a local circular economy, where one person's wardrobe finds a new life with another, in a spirit of sharing, empowerment and sisterhood.
about.story_p4: Here, every order matters: for the planet, for your wallet and for your confidence. Mix&Match's goal is to offer women unique, accessible and easy-to-wear pieces — while proving that fashion can be fun without overconsumption.
about.value1_desc: Every piece has a story. We give it a second life rather than a landfill destination.
about.value2_desc: Every item is inspected, cleaned and authenticated by our team before going on sale.
about.value3_desc: Choosing pre-owned reduces textile production and lowers our collective carbon footprint.
about.value4_desc: Based in Gatineau, we support more responsible fashion and a stronger local economy.
about.team_sub: Fashion enthusiasts who believe in a more responsible future.
about.cta_text: Give a second life to unique garments while shopping responsibly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to your questions.
faq.cat1_q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.cat1_a1: We accept Visa, Mastercard and American Express cards through our secure payment partner Stripe. All transactions are encrypted.
faq.cat1_q2: Can I modify or cancel my order?
faq.cat1_a2: You can cancel your order within 2 hours of purchase by contacting us by email. After that, the order is already being processed.
faq.cat1_a3: Absolutely. All your personal and banking information is protected by end-to-end SSL encryption. We never store your card details.
faq.cat2_a1: Standard shipping: 5-7 business days. Express shipping: 2-3 business days. In-store pickup available in Gatineau at no charge.
faq.cat2_a2: Yes, we ship to all Canadian provinces via Canada Post. Shipping fees may apply depending on your province.
faq.cat2_q3: How do I track my order?
faq.cat2_a3: You'll receive an email with your Canada Post tracking number as soon as your package ships. You can track your order at canadapost.ca.
faq.cat3_a1: You have 48 hours after receiving your order to initiate a return. Items must be in their original condition, unworn.
faq.cat3_q2: How do I make a return?
faq.cat3_a2: Contact us by email with your order number. We'll send you a prepaid return label. Refunds are processed within 5-7 days.
faq.cat3_a3: Yes, return shipping is covered by Mix&Match Frip for any item not matching its description. For a personal return, a $4.99 fee applies.
faq.cat4_q1: How do you assess item condition?
faq.cat4_a1: We use 4 levels: New with tags, Excellent condition, Very good condition, Good condition. Every item is inspected, cleaned and photographed by our team.
faq.cat4_a2: Yes, every branded item is authenticated by our stylists before listing. We never sell counterfeits.
faq.cat4_q3: Can I sell my clothes on Mix&Match Frip?
faq.cat4_a3: We're working on a consignment program! For now, contact us directly by email to discuss your items.
faq.contact_text: Our team is available Monday to Friday from 9am to 6pm.
